title: デスパレートに輝いて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The academy and Bubblyland are holding a
special collaborative event. I head my way over,
when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hey, um, Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about time that you finally tell me why
we're here...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: El, don't you know what's happening here today?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, I think I heard something about the
Umamusume Splash Bash. Some kind of water gun
contest, yeah? You want us to compete?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Not "us." You.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You said you wanted to run with me again, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! I was really hoping you would...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Then show me some passion. Beat everyone here,
and I'll run.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! But what do water guns even have to do
with—

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that. So what're you going to
do? Fold your hand?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
BUT! If I win, you definitely have to run with me
again!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh. Pretty sure I already said that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, El registers as a contestant in the
Umamusume Splash Bash.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thirsty? How about a drink from my water guns of
fury! There's no escaping the El Aerial Strike!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! El Condor Pasa takes down three
combatants in quick succession!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Come and get some! I won't run OR hide!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Doesn't matter who—prepare to get soaked!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: (Good, El. That's exactly the fire I wanted to see.)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: (Just how serious are you prepared to get?)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A total! Knockout! Victory by El! That's what you
get for crossing the strongest!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Okay, you can pipe down a bit.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I saw it in your eyes, though...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Where was this fire when we were training
together, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Defeat, a total knockout—El's down for the
count. I barely even made it to the finals...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No time to mope about it, though! Pushing on is
also one of my strengths!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Where was this fire when we were training
together, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
When we trained that one time, you didn't have
this kinda drive—fighting for the win here and
now, not caring what comes next.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm seriously putting in everything to get stronger!
From racing with powerful rivals to rethinking my
own approaches—every day's a training fiesta!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And it's all in the name of racing overseas!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well that's... Yeah, maybe...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was so wrapped up in making it overseas. I guess
I wasn't focused enough on winning...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow, after classes are out.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow? What's happening tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You and me—training. What, lose your nerve?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: N-not in a million years!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And I'll definitely show you that I'm in it to win it!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Finally... There's that love of the game I know all
too well!
